about.biography: I'm an 18-year-old developer from Erode with a passion for building web applications and solving complex problems.
about.bio_extended: I love learning new technologies, collaborating with teams, and creating user-friendly applications that make a difference. When I'm not coding, you can find me reading tech blogs or contributing to open-source projects.
